avatar.name: Evanescia
avatar.description:
One season the Phantasmoon waxes full, one season the mortal world shifts anew: The mysterious girl reappears in Planarcadia!
Fallen petals scatter with ease, and her stay was but a fleeting instant. Everything about this new era enthralls her, and she will not allow anyone to bring it to ruin...
A single ruler blade judges right from wrong, but who can say how much good or evil lies within oneself?

skills.name: Syllabus: Pop Quiz
skills.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Discipline: Final Verdict
skills.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to adjacent targets. Additionally gains **4[i]** **Punchline**.

skills.name: Swordsong: Absolution Denied
skills.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to all enemy targets, then deals 5 instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Physical DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to one random enemy.

skills.name: Youth: Halcyon Evermore
skills.description:
Evanescia gains Elation equal to **5[i]%** of CRIT DMG. When Evanescia gains Energy, she will simultaneously gain an equal amount of "**Certified Banger**." When Evanescia gains "**Certified Banger**," she will simultaneously gain an equal amount of Energy. The amount of "**Certified Banger**" taken into calculation via this method cannot exceed **100** points in a single instance.
After accumulating **3[i]** Energy, she consumes this accumulation of **3[i]**, and "Master Fox" launches **Follow-Up ATK**, dealing Physical DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies, and regenerates **4[i]** Energy for Evanescia. Each instance of Energy regeneration grants up to an accumulation of **3[i]**. While Evanescia holds "**Certified Banger**":
Using Skill can deal ****7[f1]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to the attacked enemy targets.
Using Ultimate can deal ****6[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies and also deals ****8[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to the enemy targets that have been randomly dealt DMG by Ultimate. When Ultimate deals **Elation DMG**, the amount of "**Certified Banger**" taken into account is at least equal to Max Energy.
Master Fox's **Follow-Up ATK** deals ****2[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: Petalfall: Floral Reminiscence
skills.description: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals Physical DMG equal to **1[i]%** of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and gains **2[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**."

skills.name: Scarlet: Elation or Execution
skills.description: Deals ****2[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies and additionally gains **1[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**".

tree.name: Syllabus: Pop Quiz
tree.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy.

tree.name: Discipline: Final Verdict
tree.description: Deals Physical DMG equal to ****2[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to adjacent targets. Additionally gains **4[i]** **Punchline**.

tree.name: Petalfall: Floral Reminiscence
tree.description: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals Physical DMG equal to **1[i]%** of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and gains **2[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: Watch All Revels
tree.description: Increases Evanescia's CRIT Rate by **30%**. When there are (≥3)/2/1 enemy target(s) on the field, the Ultimate's bounce count increases by **1**/**2**/**4**. When a teammate with an Elation Skill Participant ID lower than Evanescia's gains "**Certified Banger**," Evanescia converts **50%** of it into her own "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: Weigh All Truths
tree.description: When "Master Fox" uses an attack, it additionally inflicts Vulnerability on the target, increasing the DMG they take by **12%** for **3** turn(s).

tree.name: Best All Blooms
tree.description: When a teammate's "**Certified Banger**" ends, Evanescia converts **50%** of it into her own "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: Scarlet: Elation or Execution
tree.description: Deals ****2[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies and additionally gains **1[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**".

ranks.name: Home: A Prayer in Dance
ranks.description: Increases All-Type RES PEN by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After "Master Fox" uses an attack, additionally triggers 1 instance of Elation Skill. Elation Skill additionally grants this unit <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "<u>Certified Banger</u>" point(s).

ranks.name: Voyage: A Wish for Everbloom
ranks.description: CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When triggering the Certified Banger gain effect from the Trace "Watch All Revels"/"Best All Blooms", additionally gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>" equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the "<u>Certified Banger</u>" gained this time.

ranks.name: Blade: A Feast on Evils
ranks.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Meadow: A Ruin by Vice
ranks.description: Evanescia's DMG dealt ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy targets' DEF.

ranks.name: Arcadia: A Glimpse of Fates
ranks.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Maiden: A Step into Dreams
ranks.description: The duration of Evanescia's "<u>Certified Banger</u>" increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The <u>Elation DMG</u> dealt by Evanescia <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. For every <unbreak>100</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" held, it additionally <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>. Up to <unbreak>1000</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" can be taken into account. After using Ultimate for the first time upon entering combat, regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for Evanescia. This effect can trigger 1 time for every <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> more instances of Ultimate used.

avatar.name: Silver Wolf LV.<unbreak>999</unbreak>
avatar.description:
A new season of Elation begins, featuring the limited-time return of the invincible player "Silver Wolf LV.**999**"!
She's conquered the universe, unlocked every cosmic achievement... What's left to play?
**"Reach the peak of 'Elation'? Boring... Since I've got the cartridge now, I make the rules~"**

skills.name: One Punch!
skills.description: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Trigger Happy
skills.description: Gains **2[i]** **Punchline** point(s) and deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK to all enemies.

skills.name: God Mode: ON!
skills.description:
Enters the "Godmode Player" state, and **advances action** by **100%**.
Deploys a Zone while in the "Godmode Player" state. While Silver Wolf LV.**999** holds "**Certified Banger**," for every 1 Skill Point consumed by an ally target within the Zone, there is a chance to trigger 1 instance of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s "**Top Loot Box**": Deals ****3[i]%**** Imaginary **Elation DMG** that is distributed evenly among all enemies, and randomly triggers 1 of the following effects:
"Big Flipping Sword": Additionally deals **True DMG** equal to **5[i]%** of the total DMG dealt this time to the enemy target with the highest HP.
"Kaboom Eggsplosion": Recovers **7[i]** Skill Point(s).
"Funky Munch Bean": Gains **6[i]** **Punchline** point(s).
The initial **fixed chance** to trigger the effect is **100%**. After a successfully trigger, the **fixed chance** for the next trigger is reduced to **4[i]%** of the current chance. If the target is defeated before it triggers, it will instead trigger on a newly entering enemy target.

skills.name: I Carry, We Win
skills.description:
After "Hidden MMR" reaches **1[i]**, can activate Ultimate. And after reaching its maximum limit, it can overflow by an additional **2[i]** point(s).
When gaining **Punchline**, Silver Wolf LV.**999** gains an equal amount of "Hidden MMR." Each point of "Hidden MMR" increases CRIT Rate by ****4[f2]%****. Once CRIT Rate reaches **100%**, each additional point of "Hidden MMR" instead increases CRIT DMG by ****6[f2]%****.
While in the "Godmode Player" state, Silver Wolf LV.**999** becomes immune to **Crowd Control debuffs**, cannot use Ultimate, and gains Enhanced Basic ATK and Enhanced Elation Skill. After fully using Enhanced Basic ATK **5[i]** time(s), she exits the "Godmode Player" state. When exiting the "Godmode Player" state, clears "Hidden MMR".
While holding "**Certified Banger**," using Basic ATK or Skill deals ****3[i]%**** Imaginary **Elation DMG** to the attacked enemy targets. And the Enhanced Basic ATK's ability DMG changes to **Elation DMG** at the same multiplier.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: This? Absolute Meta!
skills.description:
Summons "Funky Munch Bean." Use again to dismiss. Using Technique does not consume Technique Points. When Technique Points reach 0, the summon is dismissed and Technique cannot be used.
"Funky Munch Bean" causes Normal Enemies within a certain range to enter a Terrified state. It will also automatically search for and attack Normal Enemies, consuming 1 Technique Point to instantly defeat them without entering combat.
While "Funky Munch Bean" is present, after entering combat, 1 instance of "**Top Loot Box**" from "Funky Munch Bean" is triggered at the start of each wave. A fixed amount of **1[i]** "**Certified Banger**" is taken into account for the **Elation DMG** dealt in this instance.

skills.name: Bonus Stage: αWolf Instant
skills.description:
Deals Imaginary DMG equal to a total of ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK, split evenly into **3[i]** hits that bounce onto random enemies. After every set number of bounces, the bouncing pauses and the **Top Loot Box** triggers 1 time. Can trigger up to **5[i]** time(s) in total.
When dealing fatal damage to all enemies on the field, this ability ends. After attackable enemy targets appear, gains 1 **extra turn** and uses this ability again based on the remaining number of bounces and **Top Loot Box** triggers. The first time this effect triggers in each turn, extends the duration of all **buffs** on this unit by 1 turn.
After all of the above DMG is dealt, launches a Final Hit that deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****4[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK, split evenly among all enemies.
Enhanced Basic ATK cannot recover Skill Points. For every **6[i]** points of "Hidden MMR" held, increases DMG dealt during Enhanced Basic ATK by **8[i]%** of the original DMG, stacking up to **7[i]** time(s).

skills.name: Pro-Gamer Move
skills.description: Gains **1[i]** "Hidden MMR" point(s).

skills.name: Honkai-DMG Demo
skills.description: Deals **2[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing ****1[i]%**** Imaginary **Elation DMG** to one random enemy. Then, resets the **fixed chance** to trigger "**Top Loot Box**" to its initial value.

tree.description: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK to one designated enemy.

tree.name: False Ending Speedrun
tree.description: When SPD is **160** or higher, increases this unit's Elation by **50%**. For every **1** SPD exceeded, increases this unit's Elation by **2%**. Up to a max of **100** excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.

tree.name: True Ending Unlocked
tree.description: If the number of **Punchline** points taken into account when using Elation Skill is **20** or more, additionally gains **20** "Hidden MMR" points (And if it's **40** or more, then gains **20** more points on top of that).

tree.name: Secret Level Maxed
tree.description: After entering the "Godmode Player" state, gains **20** "Hidden MMR" point(s).

tree.name: Pro-Gamer Move
tree.description: Gains **1[i]** "Hidden MMR" point(s).

ranks.name: Aether Editing: Eidolon +1
ranks.description: Enemy targets in the Zone take <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> increased DMG.\nWhen exiting the "Godmode Player" state, "Hidden MMR" will not be cleared. Instead, <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of "Hidden MMR" will be retained.

ranks.name: It's a Feature, Not a Bug
ranks.description: After entering the "Godmode Player" state, extends the duration of all <u>buffs</u> on this unit by 1 turn. In the current "Godmode Player" state, for every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Hidden MMR" increased (including the initial "Hidden MMR"), Silver Wolf LV.<unbreak>999</unbreak> gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and regains 1 use of Enhanced Basic ATK.

ranks.name: Max Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>? Says who?
ranks.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: I Came. I Saw. I One-Shot.
ranks.description: <u>Elation DMG</u> dealt by "Honkai-DMG Demo" additionally takes into account <u>Punchline</u>, equal to the original amount multiplied by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Basic ATK Is the New Ultimate
ranks.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Solo Maxxing!
ranks.description: <u>Elation DMG</u> dealt during Enhanced Basic ATK <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.\nWhen enemy targets enter combat, they are implanted with "Absolute Weakness": Has All-Type Weakness, and reduces their All-Type <u>Base RES</u> to 0. (If <u>Base RES</u> is already at 0, then the corresponding Type RES decreases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> instead).

avatar.name: Elation Caelus
avatar.description:
A {Fgirl{Mboy who boarded the Astral Express.
{FShe{MHe chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

skills.name: Make Some Noise
skills.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Let the Storm Rage On
skills.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of the Trailblazer's ATK to all enemies and gains **2[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**."

skills.name: May the Trailblaze Fly You Starward
skills.description:
Gains **6[i]** **Punchline** point(s). Increases the CRIT DMG of one designated ally by ****1[i]%**** for **2[i]** turn(s), and dispels **Crowd Control debuffs** on them.
If the target has Elation Skill, they additionally gain **4[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**" and immediately use their Elation Skill 1 time, taking into account a fixed amount of **5[i]** **Punchline** point(s). If the enemy target is defeated before the Elation Skill is unleashed, then the Elation Skill is instead launched on a newly entering enemy target.
If the target does not have Elation Skill, their **action advances** by **3[i]%**.

skills.name: That Smile Hits Different
skills.description:
After using an attack, regenerates a fixed amount of **1[i]** Energy and gains **2[i]** **Punchline** point(s).
When the Trailblazer holds "**Certified Banger**," their Skill additionally deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to all enemies. This DMG is calculated using the highest "**Certified Banger**" value among all allies.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: We Are So Back!
skills.description:
After using Technique, randomly gains 1 of the following effects:
A low chance to gain "Hearty Laughter": Increases Elation by **1[i]%**.
A high chance to gain "Irrepressible Laughter": Increases Elation by **3[i]%**.
When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for **5[i]** turn(s).

skills.name: I Said "Elation," Did I Stutter?
skills.description: Deals **1[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing ****2[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to one random enemy. At last, deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG**, which is split evenly among all enemies.

When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for **5[i]** turn(s).

tree.name: On Cloud Nine
tree.description: For every **200** point(s) of Trailblazer's ATK that exceeds **1000**, increases this unit's Elation stat by **10%**, up to a maximum increase of **60%**.

tree.name: Screw It, We Ball
tree.description: Increases this unit's CRIT Rate by **15%**. After using Ultimate, recovers **1** Skill Point(s) for the team.

tree.name: Aha, Sic 'Em!
tree.description: After an ally target uses Elation Skill, Trailblazer additionally gains **2** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**" the next time they use their Skill.

tree.description: Deals **1[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing ****2[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to one random enemy. At last, deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG**, which is split evenly among all enemies.

ranks.name: Believe In the Light
ranks.description: After using Skill, the next Ultimate increases the amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" gained by ally targets by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

ranks.name: History in the Making...
ranks.description: Ultimate additionally increases the Elation of one designated ally by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

ranks.name: Into the Spotlight
ranks.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Save the World. Just Because.
ranks.description: When using Elation Skill, increases the DMG taken by enemy targets by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

ranks.name: Love & Courage: Always in Style
ranks.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: The Cosmic Legend Cometh!
ranks.description: When using Elation Skill, increases this unit's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns.

{FShe{MHe chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

skills.description:
Gains **6[i]** **Punchline** point(s). Increases the CRIT DMG of one designated ally by ****1[i]%**** for **2[i]** turn(s), and dispels **Crowd Control debuffs** on them.
If the target has Elation Skill, they additionally gain **4[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**" and immediately use their Elation Skill 1 time, taking into account a fixed amount of **5[i]** **Punchline** point(s). If the enemy target is defeated before the Elation Skill is unleashed, then the Elation Skill is instead launched on a newly entering enemy target.
If the target does not have Elation Skill, their **action advances** by **3[i]%**.

skills.name: That Smile Hits Different
skills.description:
After using an attack, regenerates a fixed amount of **1[i]** Energy and gains **2[i]** **Punchline** point(s).
When the Trailblazer holds "**Certified Banger**," their Skill additionally deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to all enemies. This DMG is calculated using the highest "**Certified Banger**" value among all allies.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: We Are So Back!
skills.description:
After using Technique, randomly gains 1 of the following effects:
A low chance to gain "Hearty Laughter": Increases Elation by **1[i]%**.
A high chance to gain "Irrepressible Laughter": Increases Elation by **3[i]%**.
When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for **5[i]** turn(s).

skills.name: I Said "Elation," Did I Stutter?
skills.description: Deals **1[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing ****2[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to one random enemy. At last, deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG**, which is split evenly among all enemies.

tree.name: Make Some Noise
tree.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.

tree.name: Let the Storm Rage On
tree.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of the Trailblazer's ATK to all enemies and gains **2[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: May the Trailblaze Fly You Starward
tree.description:
Gains **6[i]** **Punchline** point(s). Increases the CRIT DMG of one designated ally by ****1[i]%**** for **2[i]** turn(s), and dispels **Crowd Control debuffs** on them.
If the target has Elation Skill, they additionally gain **4[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**" and immediately use their Elation Skill 1 time, taking into account a fixed amount of **5[i]** **Punchline** point(s). If the enemy target is defeated before the Elation Skill is unleashed, then the Elation Skill is instead launched on a newly entering enemy target.
If the target does not have Elation Skill, their **action advances** by **3[i]%**.

When the Trailblazer holds "**Certified Banger**," their Skill additionally deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to all enemies. This DMG is calculated using the highest "**Certified Banger**" value among all allies.

tree.description:
After using Technique, randomly gains 1 of the following effects:

A high chance to gain "Irrepressible Laughter": Increases Elation by **3[i]%**.
When the next battle begins, increases all allies' Elation stat by the corresponding amount for **5[i]** turn(s).

tree.name: On Cloud Nine
tree.description: For every **200** point(s) of Trailblazer's ATK that exceeds **1000**, increases this unit's Elation stat by **10%**, up to a maximum increase of **60%**.

tree.name: Screw It, We Ball
tree.description: Increases this unit's CRIT Rate by **15%**. After using Ultimate, recovers **1** Skill Point(s) for the team.

tree.name: Aha, Sic 'Em!
tree.description: After an ally target uses Elation Skill, Trailblazer additionally gains **2** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**" the next time they use their Skill.

tree.name: I Said "Elation," Did I Stutter?
tree.description: Deals **1[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing ****2[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG** to one random enemy. At last, deals ****3[i]%**** Lightning **Elation DMG**, which is split evenly among all enemies.

ranks.name: Believe In the Light
ranks.description: After using Skill, the next Ultimate increases the amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" gained by ally targets by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

ranks.name: History in the Making...
ranks.description: Ultimate additionally increases the Elation of one designated ally by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

ranks.name: Into the Spotlight
ranks.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Save the World. Just Because.
ranks.description: When using Elation Skill, increases the DMG taken by enemy targets by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

ranks.name: Love & Courage: Always in Style
ranks.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: The Cosmic Legend Cometh!
ranks.description: When using Elation Skill, increases this unit's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns.

weapon.name: Tomorrow, Together
weapon.refinements: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases all allies' Elation by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

weapon.name: Welcome to the Cosmic City
weapon.refinements: Increases the wearer's SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. The Elation DMG dealt ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's DEF. When the wearer uses Ultimate on themselves, gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of "Punchline." This effect can be triggered up to 1 time. And resets this trigger count after using Basic ATK <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s).

weapon.name: Until the Flowers Bloom Again
weapon.refinements: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and Energy Regeneration Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>. When the wearer's Max Energy is greater than <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>, for every <unbreak>10</unbreak> points of Max Energy that exceeds this amount, further increases Energy Regeneration Rate by <unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak>. Up to a maximum of <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> points of excess Max Energy can be taken into account. When the wearer uses Elation Skill, increases the DMG received by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Effects of the same type cannot stack.

item.name: Tear of Phagousa
item.description: A glass-like water droplet. Used to level up Traces slightly for **Nihility** characters.

item.name: Wine of Phagousa
item.description: Waves overflowing from the cup. Used to level up Traces moderately for **Nihility** characters.

item.name: Heart of Phagousa
item.description: A crystal made of countless ocean waves. Used to level up Traces significantly for **Nihility** characters.

item.name: Commemorative Cartridge
item.description: A game cartridge featuring the Baseball Raccoon avatar, the proof of a popular streamer. It can be used to superimpose the Light Cone: "Tomorrow, Together."

item.name: Access Card
item.description: Can be used to open Relic Chests in the mysterious collection at Herta Space Station.

item.name: Universal Popularity Crown: Neon Cat-ear Headphones
item.description: A pair of futuristic cat-ear headphones with a bold, adorable design, glowing with a signature pink neon light. The perfect proof that you've made it as a top streamer.

item.name: Little Raccoon Goes Full Evanefox
item.description: A pair of tall, slender pink fox ears set on a headband, their edges adorned with delicate silver metal accents and crafted with exceptional care.

item.name: Furbobo Goggles
item.description: Featuring a wide frame and eye-catching orange-tinted lenses, these Furbobocom special-issue goggles are made to protect your eyes in the chaos of breaking news on site.

item.name: Cool Overload Shades
item.description: With translucent, multicolored lenses and blue-pink flame effects along the edges, these retro arcade-style glasses are, by appearance alone, almost a perfect 1:1 match to the original.

item.name: Furbobo Press Corps
item.description: The Furbobo Press Corps, led by Furbulitzer, your most trusted, most talkative, and most work-life-balanced employees.

item.name: Age of Trailblaze! Formalwear Set
item.description: An outfit for the conductor. They can change into it using Pom-Pom's Coatroom in the Party Car.

item.name: Golden Dream! Formalwear Set
item.description: An outfit for the conductor. They can change into it using Pom-Pom's Coatroom in the Party Car.

item.name: Arcadia Rush
item.description: A top player zips through a miniature city, determined to leave not a single Gold Coin behind. What do you think? Can she make it all the way to the end?

item.name: Silver Wolf LV.<unbreak>999</unbreak>
item.description: A card used in Cosmicon Collective matches, originating from the Expansion Pack II.

item.name: Talent Point
